# W003 should not fire inside a {{with}} block when a nonil-tagged variable
# is also accessed. The nonil variable's temporary "." guard must not clobber
# the {{with}} block's "." guard.

check-templates -w
! stderr 'W003'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var source embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))

type Strings struct {
	Title   string
	Welcome string
}

type Owner struct {
	Name string
}

type Page struct {
	S     *Strings `templatecheck:"nonil"`
	Owner *Owner
}

func handleOwner(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(w, "detail.gohtml", Page{
		S:     &Strings{Title: "App", Welcome: "Hi"},
		Owner: &Owner{Name: "Alice"},
	})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- detail.gohtml --
{{$s := .S}}
{{with .Owner}}
<h1>{{$s.Title}}: {{.Name}}</h1>
{{end}}
